description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM GPU/GenAI ROCm CI that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, on a scheduled cron job, and on manual workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build_artifact and test_and_publish_artifact. The build_artifact job builds FBGEMM GPU on CPU hosts with various configurations, while the test_and_publish_artifact job tests the built artifact on GPU and optionally publishes it to PyPI.
